name: Knockout Blows: Giants Fall as Messi Rewrites the Record
angle: The Round of 32 has turned brutal — Germany and the Netherlands were both dumped out on penalties, Haaland dragged Norway into a last-16 date with Brazil, and Lionel Messi now stands alone as the World Cup's all-time leading scorer.

questions.question: Germany crashed out of the World Cup in the Round of 32, beaten on penalties by which unfancied side?
Which striker struck a late winner to send Norway past Ivory Coast and into the last 16?
France eased past Sweden 3-0 in the Round of 32, with which forward scoring twice?
Lionel Messi is now the outright all-time leading goalscorer in World Cup history. Which player did he overtake at the top of the list?
The all-time World Cup goals record that Messi has now surpassed had stood at how many goals?
Messi and which other forward jointly lead the 2026 Golden Boot race, each on six goals?
Morocco knocked the Netherlands out on penalties. Which goalkeeper made the decisive save in the shootout?
Paraguay's shootout win in the Round of 32 was hailed as a great upset — it eliminated which four-time World Cup winners?
Norway's win over Ivory Coast was a landmark for the nation because it was their first-ever World Cup...?
Brazil booked a last-16 tie with Norway by winning their Round of 32 match 2-1 against whom?
Brazil's Ronaldo sits fourth on the all-time World Cup scoring list, just behind Klose. How many World Cup goals did he score in his career?
Whose header deep in stoppage time forced extra time for Morocco against the Netherlands, before the shootout?
Antonio Nusa opened the scoring for Norway against Ivory Coast, teed up by which captain and playmaker?
Who scored Germany's equaliser against Paraguay to force extra time, before the fatal shootout?
Which winger supplied two assists as France dismantled Sweden 3-0 to reach the last 16?
